text: MITRE ATT&CK T1566 - Phishing: Adversaries may send phishing messages to gain access to victim systems.
MITRE ATT&CK T1059 - Command and Scripting Interpreter: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands.
MITRE ATT&CK T1071 - Application Layer Protocol: Adversaries may communicate using application layer protocols to avoid detection.
MITRE ATT&CK T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact: Adversaries may encrypt data on target systems to disrupt availability.
MITRE ATT&CK T1003 - OS Credential Dumping: Adversaries may attempt to dump credentials from system memory.
MITRE ATT&CK T1547 - Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Adversaries may configure system settings to automatically execute programs.
MITRE ATT&CK T1562 - Impair Defenses: Adversaries may disable security tools to avoid detection.
MITRE ATT&CK T1078 - Valid Accounts: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts.
MITRE ATT&CK T1190 - Exploit Public-Facing Application: Adversaries may exploit weaknesses in public-facing systems.
MITRE ATT&CK T1485 - Data Destruction: Adversaries may destroy data on target systems.
